name: Dashboard
description: Multi-panel terminal interface with persistent navigation sidebar, system status widgets, quick actions, and recent files. The default Nucleon terminal experience.

options_schema.label: Navigation Width
options_schema.description: Width of the navigation panel in columns.

options_schema.label: Show System Status
options_schema.description: Display CPU, memory, and disk usage on the home screen.

options_schema.label: Show Recent Files
options_schema.description: Display recently accessed files on the home screen.

options_schema.label: Show Quick Actions
options_schema.description: Display quick-launch navigation tiles on the home screen.

options_schema.label: Clock Format
options_schema.description: Time display format in the header bar.

options_schema.label: Show Status Shortcuts
options_schema.description: Display keyboard shortcut hints in the status bar.
